hero.mainTitle: Your AI-powered personal diary that actually understands you
hero.mainSubtitle: Write freely, reflect deeply, and get meaningful insights from your thoughts.
hero.subtitle: WinDear is your private AI-powered diary that helps you reflect, grow, and feel understood.
hero.note: No pressure. No judgment. Just you.
why.title: Why WinDear?
why.subtitle: Because your thoughts deserve a better home than just your head.
how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three simple steps to a clearer mind.
features.title: Everything you need for clarity
privacy.title: Your thoughts are private
privacy.subtitle: WinDear is built on a foundation of trust. We believe your reflections are sacred, and we treat them with the highest level of security.
cta.title: Start understanding yourself today.
auth.subtitle: Your private space for reflection and growth.
dash.empty.title: Start your first entry
dash.empty.subtitle: Write what’s on your mind. Your thoughts are safe here.
dash.empty.demoText: I managed to finish all my tasks ahead of time, which felt really rewarding...
feedback.title: Help us improve
dash.consistencyText: You've written {{count}} times. Keep going to build a deeper understanding of yourself.
dash.tipText: Try writing for just 5 minutes without stopping. Don't worry about grammar or sense—just let it flow.
dash.prompt.reflection.text:
How am I feeling today?
What went well?
What could have been better?
landing.struggle.title: The weight of unsaid things.
landing.struggle.item1.title: Your thoughts stay messy
landing.struggle.item1.desc: Tangled ideas that never find a way out.
landing.struggle.item2.title: No clarity, just overthinking
landing.struggle.item2.desc: The same loops playing over and over.
landing.struggle.item3.title: No one to reflect with
landing.struggle.item3.desc: Keeping it all inside because it feels too much.
landing.relief.title: A companion for your mind.
landing.relief.item1.title: Turn thoughts into clarity
landing.relief.item1.desc: AI insights that help you see the patterns.
landing.relief.item2.title: AI that understands your emotions
landing.relief.item3.title: Private, judgment-free space
landing.relief.item3.desc: Your data is yours. Safe, secure, and silent.
landing.how.step1.title: 1. Write freely
landing.how.step1.desc: Express whatever is on your mind. No filters, no formatting, just raw thoughts.
landing.how.step2.title: 2. Get AI insight
landing.how.step2.desc: Understand your emotions and patterns. Our AI reflects back what you might have missed.
landing.how.step3.title: 3. Grow over time
landing.how.step3.desc: See your thoughts evolve. Track your journey and watch your self-awareness deepen.
landing.features.item1.title: AI emotional insights
landing.features.item1.desc: Deeply understand your feelings through gentle AI reflections.
landing.features.item2.title: Mood tracking
landing.features.item2.desc: See how your mood changes and what influences it over time.
landing.features.item3.title: Weekly reflections
landing.features.item3.desc: A weekly look back at your thoughts, patterns, and progress.
landing.features.item4.title: Private & secure
landing.features.item4.desc: A safe space where your privacy is always the only priority.
landing.privacy.item1: We do not sell your data
landing.privacy.note: No judgment. No leaks. Just a safe space for you.
landing.cta.note1: Takes less than 10 seconds to start
